name: Credit Repair Advisors
description_short: Brooklyn-based law firm specializing in bankruptcy, debt collection defense, and credit repair with 20 years of experience representing clients nationwide.
description_long:
The Law Office of Abel L. Pierre is a debt and bankruptcy legal practice based in Brooklyn, New York, founded and operated by attorney Abel L. Pierre. The firm has accumulated 20 years of experience representing clients facing various financial and credit challenges, with a focus on consumer rights protection and legal defense against creditors.

The firm offers a comprehensive range of services centered on bankruptcy law, debt collection defense, and credit repair. Their primary service areas include Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy representation, defense against debt collection lawsuits, credit report error disputes, identity theft resolution, foreclosure defense, and consumer rights advocacy under federal statutes like the FDCPA and TCPA. They also address specialized issues such as wage garnishment, frozen bank accounts, medical debt, and civil court litigation related to debt claims.

What distinguishes this firm is their specific focus on consumer protection against aggressive collection practices and their extensive experience with identity theft cases affecting credit reports. The website demonstrates detailed knowledge of predatory collection tactics used by agencies and smaller creditors, such as gyms sending unpaid accounts to collections with inflated fees and interest. They emphasize written documentation and aggressive consumer advocacy.

As a law firm rather than a credit repair company, this business serves clients requiring legal representation rather than those seeking standalone credit dispute services. Their strength lies in courtroom defense and negotiated resolution of existing legal claims, though they may be less suitable for consumers simply wanting to dispute credit report errors without litigation.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 20 years of documented experience representing identity theft victims nationwide
Specializes in FDCPA and TCPA violation defense, protecting consumers from illegal collection practices
Offers affordable solutions explicitly mentioned for clients with financial constraints
Provides multiple contact methods including phone (347-934-8933, 888-744-0757), email, and online contact form
Conducts remote consultations via video, phone, and email to accommodate clients
Demonstrates deep understanding of how creditors inflate balances with interest, penalties, and legal fees
Addresses specialized issues like wage garnishment defense and frozen bank account recovery
cons: Law firm model means higher costs than typical credit repair companies; no pricing transparency on website
Limited to legal representation approach rather than offering standalone credit disputes for errors
Brooklyn-based with no indication of service areas outside New York, though website mentions nationwide representation
Website content is outdated (most recent article from March 2023, older post from 2017)
Does not offer proactive credit building or credit monitoring services beyond dispute resolution
best_for: Consumers facing active debt collection lawsuits or wage garnishment seeking legal defense
Identity theft victims with fraudulent accounts or inquiries appearing on credit reports
New York-based consumers receiving collection calls or court judgments from creditors
Individuals dealing with FDCPA or TCPA violations by debt collectors or collection agencies
diagnosis: Best for consumers facing active legal debt collection issues, lawsuits, or identity theft requiring attorney representation rather than consumers seeking simple credit dispute services. Main caveat: this is a law firm with corresponding costs, not a standalone credit repair company, and serves primarily New York-based clients despite nationwide identity theft experience claims.
services: Bankruptcy representation (Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filing and defense)
Debt collection lawsuit defense and litigation
Credit report error dispute and correction
TCPA violation claims related to collection calls
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
